notes: Phase 3 closed 2026-07-05. Actions/config shipped on sector/actions, merged --no-ff: staged ADR-004 loader, closed placeholder grammar, single-slot rule with attested sh -c payload exemption, canonical-JSON projection byte-matching ADR-004 §9 example, hand-rolled SHA-256 (FIPS vectors), trust store + prompt + non-TTY refusal, executor with chain policy, all-or-nothing env landing, print-seam quoting, PATH sanitisation, first-success-wins visit credit under 10 s rate limit, compiled-in edit/print-path defaults. 18 tests. Deviations flagged in HANDOFF: trust-change diff view shows full listing (hash-only store), detached spawns use process_group+null stdio in lieu of setsid (no libc on roster).
